item.title: Tim_Vickery: Tim Vickery @Tim_Vickery · 3min Mundiales enjoyed the Maracana só much last night, asked to come back tonight..... 7 195

item.title: CPFC: Crystal Palace F.C. @CPFC · 26min Maxence just gets it 3 4 80 2 mil

item.title: CPFC: Crystal Palace F.C. @CPFC · 37min Aura. 3 5 85 2 mil
CPFC: Crystal Palace F.C. @CPFC · 51min Admin again, Allez, Allez Cita Ed Aarons @ed_aarons · 2h Glasner says Palace's players
item.description: Crystal Palace F.C. @CPFC · 51min Admin again, Allez, Allez Cita Ed Aarons @ed_aarons · 2h Glasner says Palace's players will be allowed to go out in Florence tonight after reaching semis. "This was the same what the Eintracht Frankfurt players asked when they won the quarter-final (in the Europa League in 2022). Hopefully the ending of the story will be the same." 5 8 240 13 mil
